allow: Bash(python --version 2>&1; python -c "import PIL; print\('Pillow OK'\)" 2>&1; python -c "import cairosvg; print\('CairoSVG OK'\)" 2>&1)
Bash(node -e "const sharp = require\('sharp'\); console.log\('sharp OK'\)" 2>&1; node -e "const jimp = require\('jimp'\); console.log\('jimp OK'\)" 2>&1)
Bash(cd /G/AI/GitHub/AI-Terminal && ls node_modules/.bin/ | grep -i tauri; cargo tauri --version 2>&1 | head -3)
Bash(python3 -c "from PIL import Image; print\('Pillow OK'\)" 2>&1; python3 -c "import PIL" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing
\\$bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\(64, 64, [System.Drawing.Imaging.PixelFormat]::Format32bppArgb\)
\\$g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\(\\$bmp\)
\\$g.Clear\([System.Drawing.Color]::Red\)
\\$g.Dispose\(\)
\\$ms = New-Object System.IO.MemoryStream
\\$bmp.Save\(\\$ms, [System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat]::Png\)
\\$bytes = \\$ms.ToArray\(\)
Write-Host 'PNG bytes:' \\$bytes.Length
Write-Host 'Sig:' \(\\$bytes[0..7] | ForEach-Object { '{0:X2}' -f \\$_ }\) -join ' '
\\$bmp.Dispose\(\)
\\$ms.Dispose\(\)
")
Bash(git -C /G/AI/GitHub/AI-Terminal config user.name; git -C /G/AI/GitHub/AI-Terminal config user.email)
Bash(git -C /G/AI/GitHub/AI-Terminal add src-tauri/icons/icon.ico src/components/themes.ts src/styles/main.css scripts/gen-icon.ps1)
Bash(cd "G:/AI/GitHub/AI-Terminal" && npm run build && npx @tauri-apps/cli build)
